dictionary_sections.definition: TheorumInfinitum is a TZPID dictionary-fill candidate anchored by the canonical relation \mathbf{A}_{total}=\underbrace{\frac{\mu_0}{4\pi}\frac{\boldsymbol{\mu}_{eff} \times\mathbf{r}}{r^3}}_{\text{Dipole}}+\underbrace{\frac{\mu_0}{4\pi}\ int\frac{\mathbf{J}_{gyro}}{|\mathbf{r}-\mathbf{r}'|}d^3r'}_{\text{Gyro Current}}+\underbrace{A_{tunnel}}_{\text{Quantum}}+\underbrace{A_{ photon}}_{\text{HelicalLight}} 72. It is not promoted content; it fills the currently empty dictionary slots from the folder's existing equation state and linked context.
dictionary_sections.contextual_meaning: In context, TheorumInfinitum names the operation or constraint expressed by the recovered equation. Source context: the genome has independently discovered this same resolution as the optimal partition of its regulatory space. **Implication for the registry:** The DAANS sphere is not a human-designed device that happens to have 153,600 nodes. It is the formalisation of a geometric principle that biology has been implementing for billions of years. The device copies nature; nature copies the mathematics.
dictionary_sections.derivable_consequences: The equation-support chain currently includes {'latex': "\mathbf{A}_{total}=\underbrace{\frac{\mu_0}{4\pi}\frac{\boldsymbol{\mu}_{eff} \times\mathbf{r}}{r^3}}_{\text{Dipole}}+\underbrace{\frac{\mu_0}{4\pi}\\ int\frac{\mathbf{J}_{gyro}}{|\mathbf{r}-\mathbf{r}'|}d^3r'}_{\text{Gyro Current}}+\underbrace{A_{tunnel}}_{\text{Quantum}}+\underbrace{A_{ photon}}_{\text{HelicalLight}} 72", 'mathml': '', 'wolfram': '', 'canonical': "\mathbf{A}_{total}=\underbrace{\frac{\mu_0}{4\pi}\frac{\boldsymbol{\mu}_{eff} \times\mathbf{r}}{r^3}}_{\text{Dipole}}+\underbrace{\frac{\mu_0}{4\pi}\\ int\frac{\mathbf{J}_{gyro}}{|\mathbf{r}-\mathbf{r}'|}d^3r'}_{\text{Gyro Current}}+\underbrace{A_{tunnel}}_{\text{Quantum}}+\underbrace{A_{ photon}}_{\text{HelicalLight}} 72"}. These relations are proposed for the derivation/support page after review.

dictionary_sections.equation_grounding: Equation grounding source: D:\Conversation\4-Ready-For-ProofReading\Biological_Quantum_Interface_COMPANION_REGISTRY_NOTE.md. The canonical equation was already present in the folder-local materialized preview.
dictionary_sections.interpretive_role: This candidate's role is to convert a partially materialized ID folder into a reviewable full-section packet without inventing a new canonical equation.
